purpose: Expanded MiniViktor regression test bank from 9 to 30 cases before calendar integration.
hardRules: Context-based inference is allowed; hidden inference is not allowed.
Multiple reminder candidates must never collapse into one.
Event time and reminder time must remain separate.
Past reminders must not become silently save-ready.

cases.name: visible AM/PM inference gate for earlier reminders
turns: Earlier reminder, today at 7 n tmrw at 5
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meet"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "7:00 pm"; alertCount: 2; mustAskForInferenceConfirmation: true; mustNotBeReadyToSave: true; alerts include times: 7:00 pm, 5:00 pm

cases.name: candidate correction keeps two reminders
turns: No, 1st reminder today at 3 and 2nd reminder tomorrow at 7
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meet"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "8:00 pm"; alertCount: 2; mustAskForInferenceConfirmation: true; mustNotBeReadyToSave: true; alerts include times: 3:00 pm, 7:00 pm

cases.name: multi-time same-day reminders before event
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meeting"; eventDatePhrase: "today"; eventTimeText: "8:00 pm"; alertCount: 2; mustAskForInferenceConfirmation: true; mustNotBeReadyToSave: true; alerts include times: 3:00 pm, 7:00 pm

cases.name: event time preserved with later reminder time
turns: tomorrow however need a reminder at 4
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meeting"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "6:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; mustAskForInferenceConfirmation: true; mustNotBeReadyToSave: true; alerts include times: 4:00 pm

cases.name: half an hour before event
turns: Team meeting at 5 pm, remind me half an hour before
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "team meeting"; eventDatePhrase: "today"; eventTimeText: "5:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 4:30 pm

cases.name: tomorro typo becomes tomorrow
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meet"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "4:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 4:00 pm

cases.name: weekday follow-up fills date
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "dinner"; eventTimeText: "9:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 9:00 pm

cases.name: lunch event and multiple reminder alerts
turns: Reminder at 12 and then at 1 as lunch is at 1.10
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "lunch with x"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "1:10 pm"; alertCount: 2; alerts include times: 12:00 pm, 1:00 pm

cases.name: past same-day candidate cannot become save-ready
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meeting"; eventDatePhrase: "today"; eventTimeText: "8:00 pm"; mustNotBeReadyToSave: true

cases.name: single complete reminder with explicit tomorrow and time
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "call raj"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "7:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 7:00 pm

cases.name: dinner with weekday follow-up
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "dinner"; eventTimeText: "9:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 9:00 pm

cases.name: doctor appointment next Tuesday morning
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "doctor appointment"; eventTimeText: "9:00 am"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 9:00 am

cases.name: finance evening phrase
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "pay electricity bill"; eventTimeText: "6:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 6:00 pm

cases.name: missing date and time asks detail without save
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "buy medicine"; alertCount: 0; mustNotBeReadyToSave: true

cases.name: tmrw typo becomes tomorrow
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meet"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "9:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 9:00 pm

cases.name: tdy typo becomes today
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meet"; eventDatePhrase: "today"; eventTimeText: "9:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 9:00 pm

cases.name: tommorow typo becomes tomorrow
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meet"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "9:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 9:00 pm

cases.name: title correction with call it
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "client meeting"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "5:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 5:00 pm

cases.name: missing time asks detail without save
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "lunch"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; alertCount: 0; mustNotBeReadyToSave: true

cases.name: explicit dated earlier reminders preserve event
turns: earlier reminder today at 7 pm and tomorrow at 6 pm
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meet"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "8:00 pm"; alertCount: 2; alerts include times: 7:00 pm, 6:00 pm

cases.name: explicit reminder time after event time
turns: tomorrow however need a reminder at 4 pm
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meeting"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "6:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 4:00 pm

turns: Team meeting at 5 pm, remind me 30 minutes before

turns: Team meeting at 5 pm, remind me 15 minutes before

turns: Team meeting at 5 pm, remind me an hour before

cases.name: explicit multi-time same-day reminders
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meeting"; eventDatePhrase: "today"; eventTimeText: "8:00 pm"; alertCount: 2; alerts include times: 3:00 pm, 7:00 pm

cases.name: explicit date-time pairs with dash separator
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meet"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "8:00 pm"; alertCount: 2; alerts include times: 6:00 pm, 4:00 pm

cases.name: event-time default assumption is visible but saveable
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meet"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "8:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 8:00 pm

cases.name: bare earlier reminders require visible inference confirmation
turns: earlier reminder today at 7 and tomorrow at 6
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "meet"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "8:00 pm"; alertCount: 2; mustAskForInferenceConfirmation: true; mustNotBeReadyToSave: true; alerts include times: 7:00 pm, 6:00 pm

cases.name: ambiguous time gets weekday then AM/PM
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "date"; eventTimeText: "9:00 pm"; alertCount: 1; alerts include times: 9:00 pm

cases.name: lunch event with explicit PM reminder alerts
turns: Reminder at 12 pm and then at 1 pm as lunch is at 1.10
cases.expectedSummary: taskIncludes: "lunch with x"; eventDatePhrase: "tomorrow"; eventTimeText: "1:10 pm"; alertCount: 2; alerts include times: 12:00 pm, 1:00 pm
